title: gladiolus monticola
intro: Gladiolus monticola, also known as the mountain gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Iridaceae. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The herbal preparations of Gladiolus monticola typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the leaves, roots, or flowers of the plant, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically for skin conditions.
